query:
-- MOTHER v14 Knowledge Database Schema
-- Created: 2026-02-22
-- Purpose: Store structured learnings for searchable knowledge base

-- Main knowledge table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knowledge (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  phase VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  category VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  impact VARCHAR(20),
  confidence DECIMAL(3,2),
  date DATE NOT NULL,
  version VARCHAR(40),
  hash VARCHAR(64) UNIQUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_phase (phase),
  INDEX idx_category (category),
  INDEX idx_type (type),
  INDEX idx_date (date),
  INDEX idx_hash (hash)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Learnings table (specific technical learnings)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS learnings (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  knowledge_id INT,
  problem TEXT NOT NULL,
  solution TEXT NOT NULL,
  learning TEXT NOT NULL,
  best_practice TEXT,
  code_example TEXT,
  references TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (knowledge_id) REFERENCES knowledge(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  INDEX idx_knowledge (knowledge_id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Mistakes table (mistakes and corrections)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mistakes (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  knowledge_id INT,
  mistake TEXT NOT NULL,
  correction TEXT NOT NULL,
  root_cause TEXT,
  prevention TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (knowledge_id) REFERENCES knowledge(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  INDEX idx_knowledge (knowledge_id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Metrics table (performance and validation metrics)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS metrics (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  knowledge_id INT,
  metric_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  before_value DECIMAL(10,4),
  after_value DECIMAL(10,4),
  improvement_pct DECIMAL(5,2),
  unit VARCHAR(20),
  confidence DECIMAL(3,2),
  p_value DECIMAL(10,8),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (knowledge_id) REFERENCES knowledge(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  INDEX idx_knowledge (knowledge_id),
  INDEX idx_metric_name (metric_name)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Best practices table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS best_practices (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  knowledge_id INT,
  practice TEXT NOT NULL,
  rationale TEXT,
  example TEXT,
  category VARCHAR(50),
  priority VARCHAR(20),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (knowledge_id) REFERENCES knowledge(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  INDEX idx_knowledge (knowledge_id),
  INDEX idx_category (category)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Tags table (for flexible categorization)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knowledge_tags (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  knowledge_id INT,
  tag VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (knowledge_id) REFERENCES knowledge(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  INDEX idx_knowledge (knowledge_id),
  INDEX idx_tag (tag)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Search index (for full-text search)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knowledge_search (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  knowledge_id INT,
  searchable_text TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (knowledge_id) REFERENCES knowledge(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FULLTEXT INDEX idx_search (searchable_text)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

  INDEX idx_knowledge (knowledge_id),
  INDEX idx_tag (tag)

-- Search index (for full-text search)
